title: Backend Developer
taskPerformed: Developed and maintained backend services using Golang with Fiber framework, ensuring high performance and scalability.
Designed and managed PostgreSQL databases for e-commerce application data storage and retrieval.
Built and maintained e-commerce platform backend, handling product catalog, orders, payments, and user management.
Managed server infrastructure on Linux environments, ensuring uptime, security, and optimal performance.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins for automated testing and deployment workflows.
Set up and maintained monitoring solutions using Grafana for system and application metrics visualization.
Integrated Elasticsearch and Kibana for centralized logging, search, and data analytics.
Configured and managed RabbitMQ for asynchronous message queuing between microservices.
Handled DevOps responsibilities including Docker containerization, server provisioning, and infrastructure management.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
taskPerformed: Led frontend development using Next.js, building performant and SEO-optimized web applications.
Implemented RESTful API integration with fetch and Axios for seamless data communication with backend services.
Developed reusable and scalable React components following modern best practices and design patterns.
Implemented responsive UI/UX designs ensuring cross-browser compatibility and mobile-first approach.
Managed application state and routing with Next.js built-in features and React hooks.
Collaborated with backend engineers to define API contracts and optimize data fetching strategies.
Conducted code reviews and mentored junior developers on frontend development best practices.

title: Software Engineer
taskPerformed: Assisted in writing and testing code under the guidance of senior developers to ensure high-quality software delivery.
Participated in debugging sessions, identifying and fixing minor bugs to improve the overall performance of the application.
Contributed to the documentation of code and processes to support knowledge sharing and onboarding of new team members.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure that all aspects of the project align with the overall objectives.
Reviewed code written by peers, providing constructive feedback to help improve code quality and maintainability.
Actively engaged in learning and applying new technologies, tools, and programming practices to stay updated with industry trends.

Mengerjakan tugas-tugas yang lebih kecil seperti penanganan bug sederhana, penambahan fitur kecil, atau modifikasi minor pada aplikasi yang ada, seringkali di bawah pengawasan ketat dari pengembang senior.
